productDisplayName: Puma Women Janine Dance Black Shoes
description: The puma Janine Dance casual shoes for women are designed for working out. These good-looking shoes can be worn for your dance class, workouts or just for casual outings. Either way you're a style winner! Upper Synthetic leather upper with glossy foam stripes on the sides for style puma logo on the toe box and collar Padded collar and tongur with embossed branding Slip on style for ease of wear Midsole OrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function Outsole TPR outsole with textured patches on the forefoot and heel Suction point with branding on the toe mound shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
